text: Welcome, helper_alex! Your application has been approved and you've been granted the Moderator role. We're glad to have you helping keep the community safe and welcoming. Check out the mod guidelines in #mod-resources and feel free to reach out if you have questions!

Welcome, guide_sam! You've been approved as an Event Helper — excited to have you on board. Head over to #events to see what's coming up and connect with the events team. Looking forward to seeing you in action!
Welcome, newbie_kim! Great to have you here as a Member. Feel free to explore, introduce yourself in #introductions, and don't hesitate to ask if you need anything. Hope you enjoy the community!

Welcome, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a Mentor — we're thrilled to have your experience and guidance in the community. Check out #mentor-lounge to connect with the mentorship team and get started. Welcome aboard!
